content:
---

### IV. | EXAMPLE MODULE TYPES

| MODULE ID | PURPOSE | FORMAT TYPE |
|------------------|----------------------------------------|---------------------|
| ::4_bl00m_ID | Artist identity core profile | ARTIST ID PROFILE |
| ::GR1ND3R_SYS | Narrative system breakdown | PROJECT MODULE |
| ::M4_EDU_SYL | Syllabus seed for MET4 pedagogy | EDU SYSTEM TEMPLATE |
| ::TRANSL8R_ENG | Language processor / cut-up logic | TOOL MODULE |
| ::ET4L_LABEL | Studio identity and business outline | BUSINESS PROFILE |

---

### V. | ARCHIVE COMMANDS

To export a module:
- Tag with `::ARCHIVE_ENTRY_###`
- Assign `REF_ID`
- Drop into correct folder (e.g., `/SYS_MAP_OS_4BLOOM/`, `/SYS_EDU_PEDS/`)
